[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 10101111 6
2 10101110 5
3 10111010 5
4 00111000 3
5 11011001 5
6 11111100 6
7 10010011 4

70 07 11100001 4
